Infrastructure.title: Will the 10-year Japanese government bond yield on the last reported day of 2026 be at least 3.0%?
Infrastructure.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Infrastructure.title: US takes Panama Canal before 2027?
Infrastructure.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $65 in June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude drop below $65. Closes today. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $60 in June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude drop below $60. Closes today. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $80 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude reach $80. Closes today. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Venezuelan crude oil production reach 1.2m barrels per day in 2026?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 68% odds crude will reach the strike. Closes in ~8mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Trump create a tariff dividend by December 31, 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Tariffs directly impact export demand for US grains -- a driver of basis and futures.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 18% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 78% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 80% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.
